name: epistemic-os
description: Epistemic Operating System v1.0 — a platform for traceable reasoning and human-in-the-loop AI workflows.

scripts.db:reset: pnpm db:down && docker compose up -d postgres && pnpm db:migrate && pnpm db:seed
scripts.ci: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test
scripts.ci:release: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build
